title: Gajapati Palace
tagline: Gajapati Palace — heritage city of Odisha

overview.short: Gajapati Palace located at Paralakhemundi, of Gajapati district, Odisha, is the seat of Ganga rulers of Paralakhemundi.
overview.description: Gajapati Palace located at Paralakhemundi, of Gajapati district, Odisha, is the seat of Ganga rulers of Paralakhemundi. Nowadays the property is under the protection of Indian National Trust for Art and Cultural Heritage (INTACH). The Palace is one of the rich architectural and cultural heritage of India. This palace was built for a purpose of permanent residential abode for the Gajapati Rulers of Paralakhemundi Estate belonging to the Eastern Ganga dynasty.

topPlaces.name: Paralakhemundi
topPlaces.description: Paralakhemundi, colloquially shortened as Parala, is the administrative headquarters of Gajapati district in the Indian state of Odisha. It is one of the oldest urban centers in the state, with its Municipality established on 17 August 1885.

topPlaces.name: Mahendratanaya River
topPlaces.description: Mahendratanaya River is a medium-sized river in India. The 90 kilometres (56 mi) long Mahendratanaya is a major tributary of Vamsadhara River which originates from Mahendragiri Hills.

topPlaces.name: Pathapatnam
topPlaces.description: Pathapatnam is a town in Srikakulam district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Pathapatnam mandal of Tekkali revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Rompivalasa
topPlaces.description: Rompivalasa is a village in Srikakulam district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Pathapatnam mandal.

topPlaces.name: Meliaputti
topPlaces.description: Meliaputti or Meliaputti is a village in Srikakulam district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Meliaputti mandal of Tekkali revenue division.

items.note: Paralakhemundi, colloquially shortened as Parala, is the administrative headquarters of Gajapati district in the Indian state of Odisha. It is one of the oldest urban centers in the state, with its Municipality established on 17 August 1885.
Mahendratanaya River is a medium-sized river in India. The 90 kilometres (56 mi) long Mahendratanaya is a major tributary of Vamsadhara River which originates from Mahendragiri Hills.
Pathapatnam is a town in Srikakulam district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Pathapatnam mandal of Tekkali revenue division.
Rompivalasa is a village in Srikakulam district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Pathapatnam mandal.
Meliaputti or Meliaputti is a village in Srikakulam district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Meliaputti mandal of Tekkali revenue division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gajapati Palace?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gajapati Palace is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gajapati Palace?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (149 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (143 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gajapati Palace?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gajapati Palace at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gajapati Palace?
faq.a: Stays in Gajapati Palace start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gajapati Palace?
faq.a: The top attractions are Paralakhemundi, Mahendratanaya River, Pathapatnam, Rompivalasa, Meliaputti.
